basic_details.job_title: VIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: VSS Institute of Medical Sciences and Research (VIMSAR), Burla, Sambalpur
basic_details.short_information: VSSIMSAR Burla invites applications for 01 post of Office Assistant under NHM on contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with 55% marks + PGDCA/DCA/MCA/BCA/OS-CIT or equivalent
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the following criteria: | Graduation with minimum 55% marks in aggregate from a recognized University. Must have passed PGDCA / DCA / MCA / BCA / OS-CIT or any equivalent computer course. Minimum 01 year post-qualification experience in Health/Social sector. Age: 21 to 40 years (as on the last date).

selection_process: - Mark Assessment (Graduation) - 40 marks - Computer Test - 40 marks - Viva-voce - 20 marks
A panel will be prepared with validity of 01 year.
how_to_apply: Applications in the prescribed proforma along with all required self-attested documents should be sent through Speed Post / Registered Post only to reach the office on or before 31.08.2026.
Address: The Superintendent, VSS Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, Burla, Sambalpur, Odisha
important_instructions: The post is purely contractual and temporary under NHM. No claim for regularization of service will be entertained. Incomplete or late applications will be rejected. Age relaxation and weightage as per OSH&FW Society norms (if applicable).

content_sections.heading: VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 Official Notification
content_sections.text: VSS Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, Burla has issued notification No. 1944/NIMSAR dated 18th July 2026 for engagement of Office Assistant on contractual basis. The detailed eligibility criteria, selection procedure and application format are available on the district website. Download VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Official Notification PDF

content_sections.text: VSSIMSAR Burla invites applications for 01 post of Office Assistant under NHM on contractual basis.

content_sections.heading: VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill the following criteria: Graduation with minimum 55% marks in aggregate from a recognized University. Must have passed PGDCA / DCA / MCA / BCA / OS-CIT or any equivalent computer course. Minimum 01 year post-qualification experience in Health/Social sector. Age: 21 to 40 years (as on the last date).

content_sections.heading: VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on: - Mark Assessment (Graduation) - 40 marks - Computer Test - 40 marks - Viva-voce - 20 marks A panel will be prepared with validity of 01 year.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Post
content_sections.text: Applications in the prescribed proforma along with all required self-attested documents should be sent through Speed Post / Registered Post only to reach the office on or before 31.08.2026. Address: The Superintendent, VSS Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, Burla, Sambalpur, Odisha

content_sections.heading: VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The post is purely contractual and temporary under NHM. No claim for regularization of service will be entertained. Incomplete or late applications will be rejected. Age relaxation and weightage as per OSH&FW Society norms (if applicable).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 is 31 August 2026. Applications must reach the office through Speed Post or Registered Post before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: VSS Institute of Medical Sciences and Research (VIMSAR), Burla has announced 01 vacancy for the post of Office Assistant (Contractual) under the National Health Mission (NHM).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for VIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Graduation degree with at least 55% marks from a recognized university along with PGDCA, DCA, MCA, BCA, OS-CIT, or an equivalent computer qualification. They should also have at least one year of post-qualification experience in the health or social sector.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must be 21 to 40 years of age as on the last date of application. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Odisha State Health & Family Welfare Society (OSH&FW) norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Office Assistant post in VSSIMSAR Burla Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly remuneration of Rs. 22,333/- plus Performance Incentive (PI) as per NHM guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit the prescribed application form along with self-attested copies of required documents through Speed Post or Registered Post to the Superintendent, VSS Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, Burla, Sambalpur, Odisha.

faq.question: Q7. Is the VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant job permanent?
faq.answer: No. The Office Assistant post is purely contractual and temporary under the National Health Mission (NHM). It does not provide any claim for regular appointment.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the VSSIMSAR Burla Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF?
faq.answer: Candidates can download the official notification PDF and application form from the Sambalpur district official website mentioned in the recruitment notification.
